name: pancreas
label: Pancreas (inDrop)
summary: Human pancreatic islet scRNA-seq data from 6 datasets across technologies (CEL-seq, CEL-seq2, Smart-seq2, inDrop, Fluidigm C1, and SMARTER-seq). Here we just use the inDrop1 batch, which includes1937 cells × 15502 genes.
description: Human pancreatic islet scRNA-seq data from 6 datasets across technologies (CEL-seq, CEL-seq2, Smart-seq2, inDrop, Fluidigm C1, and SMARTER-seq). Here we just use the inDrop1 batch, which includes1937 cells × 15502 genes.

name: pbmc
label: 1k Peripheral blood mononuclear cells
summary: 1k Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells (PBMCs) from a healthy donor. Sequenced on 10X v3 chemistry in November 2018 by 10X Genomics.
description: 1k Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells (PBMCs) from a healthy donor. Sequenced on 10X v3 chemistry in November 2018 by 10X Genomics.

name: tabula_muris_senis_lung_random
label: Tabula Muris Senis Lung
summary: All lung cells from Tabula Muris Senis, a 500k cell-atlas from 18 organs and tissues across the mouse lifespan. Here we use just 10x data from lung. 24540 cells × 16160 genes across 3 time points.
description: All lung cells from Tabula Muris Senis, a 500k cell-atlas from 18 organs and tissues across the mouse lifespan. Here we use just 10x data from lung. 24540 cells × 16160 genes across 3 time points.
